title: Current AI Architectures as EML-3 Systems

analysis.object: T610: Current AI Architectures as EML-3 Systems depth analysis

attention_mechanism.description: Transformer attention: softmax over dot products; EML-3 oscillatory weighting
attention_mechanism.reason: Attention is EML-3: softmax creates oscillatory probability distribution over tokens

token_embeddings.description: Token embeddings: EML-2 (vector measurement of semantic similarity)
token_embeddings.reason: Embeddings are EML-2: geometric measurement in high-dimensional space

emergent_behavior.description: Emergent behaviors at scale: EML-3 oscillatory patterns; NOT EML-inf qualia
emergent_behavior.reason: Emergence is EML-3: complex oscillatory coordination without TYPE3 categorification

no_qualia.description: No current AI architecture has TYPE3 jump; d(LLM) = 3 at most
no_qualia.reason: Structural: transformers lack self-referential fixed point; cannot reach d=inf

analysis.theorem: T610: Current AI Architectures as EML-3 Systems (S889).

key_theorem: T610: Current AI Architectures as EML-3 Systems (S889).
